subject: docs(claude-md): replace Triggers section with glow-props fleet version
body:
Adopts the cross-fleet 2026-04-17 Triggers redesign: 48 triggers across
8 groups (correctness/trust/speed/frontend/quality/ops/design/fleet),
6 meta sweeps (hot/quick/ship/session/tidy/all), 7 reflective passes
(risk/surface/wrap/skipped/assumed/approach/cold), and scope modifiers
(branch/staged/file). Replaces the older 10-trigger single-word list.

Also adds an AI Note on trigger-name collisions with repo folders and
concepts (docs/, src/config/, __tests__/, mobile, pwa, state, ci) so
future sessions can disambiguate trigger invocations from normal
references in prose.

Tags: docs, triggers, fleet-alignment, claude-md
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: fleet-claude-md-alignment
Semver: patch
